text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 74 

READMISSIONS 

LABEL: Acute Inpatient Hospital Readmissions 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of hospital readmissions in the acute inpatient setting for a given year. 

The CLM_THRU_DT for the original admission must have been in the year of the data file, however it 
was permissible for the readmission claim to have occurred in January of the following year. A
